docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAUM FRED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEPANE MACK $266.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $299.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAUM FRED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEPANE MACK $266.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $299.00, GARAGE SPACE AT WIESE ST GARAGE NO 7 S.F. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEPANE MACK
